name: sutra
description: Sutra — Operating system for building with AI. Input routing, depth estimation, readability gate, output trace. Opinionated governance for Claude Code sessions.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Sutra Core — governance primitives: input routing, depth estimation, readability gate, output trace. Hooks warn when depth marker is missing before Edit/Write; estimation metrics are logged on session end. Includes session-retrieve for recovering abruptly-closed sessions.
